title: The Eternal Skald
description:
An AI-powered storyteller, oracle interpreter, and tactical enemy controller for Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve campaigns in Foundry VTT v14. Powered by Abacus AI ChatLLM. Type !skald-help in chat for commands.

v0.3.1 — enemy ranks now come straight from the official Ironsworn foe compendium: standard foes (Bear, Wolf, Wyvern, …) are auto-ranked with fuzzy/typo-tolerant name matching, and only invented foes need an explicit rank. Builds on the v0.3.0 automatic combat system: the Skald creates a combat progress track per foe, marks harm by rank on a Strike/Clash hit, and tracks initiative through Enter the Fray — on top of deep integration with the foundry-ironsworn rules engine (suggesting moves, triggering the system's own roll mechanics, narrating official outcomes, and applying mechanical effects). Works standalone too — Ironsworn features activate automatically when the system is present.

recommends.reason: Optional but recommended. When the Ironsworn system is active, the Skald integrates with its rules engine to trigger moves, read character state, and narrate official roll outcomes. The module also works standalone in any system, but Ironsworn-specific mechanics are then unavailable.
